title: ColCol
description: Addadd somsom colcol toto youyou liflif.
body:
Colcol is a revolutionary new mod that adds Purpur block variants for every single dye colour!

Not only will you finally be able to decorate your base with Blabla or Oraora blocks, but if you use a resource pack, the textures update to ensure that the Colcol blocks use the same base texture as the Purpur block from the resource pack!

here's a video showing them off!

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via  Patreon.
